title: The Hidden Cost of Lifestyle Inflation

segments.text: Lifestyle inflation creeps into wealth silently.
And here's a surprising truth about it.
It often overshadows true financial growth.
This requires mindfulness to combat spending urges.
That's why awareness is your financial shield.
Follow for the money mindset they never taught you.

description: Lifestyle inflation can hinder your financial progress. Follow for the money mindset they never taught you. 🚧
